sql_array: CREATE TABLE geospatial_data (id INT, location VARCHAR(255), geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, location, geom) VALUES (1, 'Location A', st_geomfromtext('POINT(10.03 30.01)', 2000));
UPDATE geospatial_data SET geom = st_geomfromtext('POINT(15.05 25.05)', 2000) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, location, geom FROM geospatial_data WHERE ST_DWithin(geom, st_geomfromtext('POINT(10.00 30.00)', 2000), 5);
DELETE FROM geospatial_data WHERE ST_Equals(geom, st_geomfromtext('POINT(10.03 30.01)', 2000));
